# Settings Evidence Gates

## Engine

- Timing: engine build sheet, compression, cam, fuel, distributor/ignition type, and source.
- Lash: cam card, lifter type, rocker ratio, valve-train geometry, and source.
- Plug type/gap: head plug reach/seat, ignition output, compression, fuel, and source.

## Induction

- Weber jetting/chokes: exact carburetor model, choke size, jet stack, fuel pressure, engine build, and source.
- Fuel pressure: pump, regulator, gauge calibration, carburetor specification, and source.

## Oiling and cooling

- Oil type/quantity: dry-sump or wet-sump layout, tank/sump, cooler, filter, pump, relief setup, and source.
- Oil pressure: bearing clearances, pump/relief setup, oil temperature, and source.
- Coolant cap/restrictor/fan behavior: radiator, pump, cap, thermostat/restrictor, fan, hose condition, and source.

## Driveline

- Transaxle oil/fill: make, model, serial, service manual, and current build.
- Gear/LSD setup: gear stack, final drive, differential type, preload/ramp documentation, and source.

## Suspension and steering

- Alignment: chassis identity, pickup points, shim stack, uprights, tire construction, ride height, use case, and source.
- Ride height/corner weights: chassis identity, spring/damper/bar data, tires, fuel load, driver ballast, and source.
- Spring/damper/anti-roll-bar setup: spring rates/free lengths, damper make/model/serial and valving/click positions, anti-roll-bar diameter/blade/arm/link geometry, motion ratios, corner weights, tire construction, use case, and source.

## Brakes, wheels, and tires

- Brake bias/fluid/pad bedding: caliper/disc/master-cylinder IDs, pad compound, balance system, tire data, and source.
- Center-lock torque: wheel, hub, nut, thread, lubrication state, manufacturer/service data, and source.
- Tire pressure: tire model, construction, age, wheel size, vehicle weight, temperature target, use case, and source.

## Electrical and safety

- Fuse/relay/wire values: wiring diagram, loads, wire gauge, alternator/generator, protection layout, and source.
- Master switch/circuit breaker: battery location, alternator/generator isolation, pump/fan shutdown behavior, current event rules, and source.
